texto: I'm not trying to convert the entire nation of Israel and the entire nation of Palestine to Christianity. But at least if you can educate them about the ideology of love, the ideology of forgiveness, the ideology of grace. Those principles are great regardless, but we can't deny they came from Christianity as well.
explicacao: Citação de Mosab Hassan Yousef sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I'm not trying to convert the entire nation of Israel and the entire nation of Palestine to Chris…” articula amor, love, great em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como great e grace.

frase_original: I'm not trying to convert the entire nation of Israel and the entire nation of Palestine to Christianity. But at least if you can educate them about the ideology of love, the ideology of forgiveness, the ideology of grace. Those principles are great regardless, but we can't deny they came from Christianity as well.
